name: zsnd_snapshot_restore_all_with_global_volume_delta
description: zSndPlayHandleSnapshot::RestoreAllWithGlobalVolumeDelta computes the current-minus-anchor gain delta and replays every payload node until the circular list reaches its head.
known_limits: VC5SP3 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 53 unmasked mismatches after relocation masking; Binary Ninja body is 93 bytes and the VC object body is 96 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
Profile sweep found vc5_o2_ob0_facs and vc5_o2_ob1_gx_facs tied as closest at 53 mismatches; VC6 profiles and /Ob2 profiles were materially worse.
Source now uses the recovered byte-mask list-end test shape also used by StopAllIfPlaying; remaining drift is VC materializing the loop condition differently around the nonempty test and back-edge.
